mcq.question: What is secondary storage?
mcq.correct: Non-volatile storage used to store data and programs long-term

mcq.question: Why can't primary storage replace secondary storage?
mcq.correct: Primary storage is volatile and loses data when power is off
wrong: Primary storage is only used for input

mcq.question: How is data read from optical storage?
mcq.correct: Using a laser to detect reflections

mcq.question: Which of these is solid-state storage?
What is virtual memory?
mcq.correct: Part of secondary storage used as an extension of RAM

mcq.question: What does non-volatile mean?
mcq.correct: Data is retained when power is off
wrong: Data is lost when power is off

mcq.question: Why are SSDs faster than HDDs?
What is an advantage of HDDs?
What is an advantage of SSDs?
mcq.correct: They are more durable because they have no moving parts
